name: LD2410 Sensor
description: The `ld2410` sensor platform allows you to use HI-LINK LD2410 motion and presence sensors with ESPHome. There are three variants with similar communication protocols:

config_entries.label: UART ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [UART Component](https://esphome.io/components/uart) if you want to use multiple UART buses.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for this [Ld2410](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/ld2410/) component if you need multiple components.
